arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham sends public message to Real Madrid teammate after error vs Athletic Club
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has taken to social media, to send a message of support to Federico Valverde. This comes in the aftermath of the Uruguayan’s headline-grabbing mistake during…

arts.ttl: ‘Who is that guy?’ – Cristiano Ronaldo fires back at ex-Real Madrid teammate
arts.sum: Real Madrid legend Cristiano Ronaldo has on Thursday evening hit back at criticism on the part of former teammate Rafael van der Vaart in ruthless fashion. This comes after the…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star 'attracting Premier League interest' following criticism over recent form
arts.sum: A Real Madrid star is reportedly attracting interest from the Premier League after seeing his recent performances draw criticism from some quarters.
